name: S-18 consumption trace records consulted-pr-corpus source ids per the L-23 cross-loop contract
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/consumption-trace.sh" --commit-sha abc123 --consulted-pr-corpus stripe-node --now 2026-05-25T10:00:00Z --emit trace.json && grep -q 'stripe-node' trace.json && echo recorded 1>&2
